basic_details.job_title: CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Engineer and Urban Designer/Planner Posts
basic_details.short_information: Centre for Management Development (CMD Kerala) Project Engineer and Urban Designer/Planner Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 17 June 2026 on the official website www.cmd.kerala.gov.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the CMD Kerala Project Engineer and Urban Designer/Planner Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Civil Engineering with MBA, B.Arch with Masters in Urban Design/Planning
qualification.details: Project Engineer: Degree in Civil Engineering from a reputed institution with MBA. Minimum 5 years of experience, out of which at least 1 year in Government projects with exposure in preparation of estimates, tender documents, and contract management. Urban Designer/Planner: B.Arch with Masters in Urban Design/Planning from a reputed institution with a minimum of 2 years' experience. Experience in Government projects/schemes is desirable.

salary_details.details: Project Engineer: Rs. 45,000/- Per Month Urban Designer/Planner: Rs. 60,000/- Per Month

selection_process: Application Screening Criteria-based Screening Written Test Group Discussion Skill Test/Proficiency Test Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CMD Kerala Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CMD Kerala to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download CMD Kerala Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.centre_for_management_development_cmd_ke: Degree in Civil Engineering with MBA, B.Arch with Masters in Urban Design/Planning

content_sections.heading: CMD Kerala Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CMD Kerala Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CMD Kerala Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Engineer: Degree in Civil Engineering from a reputed institution with MBA. Minimum 5 years of experience, out of which at least 1 year in Government projects with exposure in preparation of estimates, tender documents, and contract management. Urban Designer/Planner: B.Arch with Masters in Urban Design/Planning from a reputed institution with a minimum of 2 years' experience. Experience in Government projects/schemes is desirable.

content_sections.heading: CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

content_sections.heading: CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Project Engineer: Rs. 45,000/- Per Month Urban Designer/Planner: Rs. 60,000/- Per Month

rows.event: Cut-off Date for Age and Experience

content_sections.heading: CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Application Screening Criteria-based Screening Written Test Group Discussion Skill Test/Proficiency Test Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CMD Kerala Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CMD Kerala to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications for the CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026 is July 1, 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the posts of Project Engineer and Urban Designer/Planner in the Centre for Management Development (CMD Kerala) Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: For the Project Engineer post, candidates must possess a Degree in Civil Engineering from a reputed institution along with an MBA. A minimum of 5 years of experience is also required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts in the CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026 is 40 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government regulations.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the provided information, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Urban Designer/Planner position?
faq.answer: The Urban Designer/Planner post offers a monthly salary of Rs. 60,000/-. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process involves multiple stages including Application Screening, Criteria-based Screening, Written Test, Group Discussion, Skill Test/Proficiency Test, and finally an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for these posts?
faq.answer: The application process for the CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026 is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website or use the provided link to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q9. What is the experience required for the Urban Designer/Planner post?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Urban Designer/Planner post must have a minimum of 2 years of experience. Experience in Government projects or schemes is considered desirable.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
